programme.title: The Friends of Eddie Coyle

programme.title: Get Christie Love!

programme.title: Hit!
programme.desc: U.S. agent Nick Allen (Billy Dee Williams) has his own idea about how to fight a war on drugs: go to the source...and cut the big-time traffickers down. Embittered over the drug-related death of his teenage daughter, Nick sets out to do just that.

programme.title: Rolling Thunder
programme.desc: William Devane and Tommy Lee Jones star as two former P.O.W.s out for revenge in this neo-noir action-thriller that Quentin Tarantino cites as one of his favorite films. Written by genre masters Paul Schrader and Heywood Gould. John Flynn directs.

programme.desc: A college couple, in 1959, see an object plummet to Earth like a meteor. The boy swallows a space slug that shoots out. In 1986, two freshmen stumble across the corpse of the boy who swallowed the space slug. Once thawed out, the corpse comes to life.

programme.title: The Blob
programme.desc: THE BLOB has returned in this horrific tale about a vile, malignant life-form that crashes to earth in a cozy, rural American town called Arborville. Untroubled by conscience or intellect, the Blob does only one thing-and does it well. Rated: R

programme.title: Clue

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: El cumpleaños de Beni se descontrola, y Rocío acaba en un fuerte enfrentamiento. Isa recibe una llamada que la lleva a tomar una decisión inesperada, mientras que Alba y Altafulla logran reconciliarse.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Un juego sexual trae consecuencias negativas para Santiago y Rocío. Alba y Karime hacen oficial su compromiso. Chile cumple su promesa, y los rumores llevan a José y Santiago a un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegan a su fin y algunos invitados se despiden de la casa, mientras que una persona especial llega de sorpresa. Todos se preparan para la fiesta, pero para algunos, será la peor noche de sus vidas.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta final da inicio y los conflictos surgen de inmediato. Mientras algunos se divierten, otros ven cómo sus relaciones llegan a su fin. Poco a poco, todos comienzan a despedirse de la casa, marcando el cierre de unas vacaciones inolvidables.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Con el inicio de las vacaciones, los shores se juntan para dar la bienvenida a los nuevos miembros de la familia. Alba se encuentra cara a cara con Diego y Karime, mientras que Chile toma la decisión de hacer justicia con el ladrón de sus frases.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta en la casa continua y la discusión entre Chile y Diego tiene un desenlace inesperado. Isa toma una decisión que lamentará y un nuevo integrante se une a la familia shore aunque su bienvenida no será la mejor.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La paz y la armonía reinan, y el jefe visita al grupo. Fernanda aparece, pero ignora a "Matryoshka". Carlos vive cinco minutos inolvidables, mientras Karime organiza una cita romántica que podría salir mal.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La cita de Karime y Fernanda da un giro inesperado, y el grupo se dirige a una fiesta. Un visitante causa sensación, y Jacky lo invita a la casa, pero los chicos se sienten incómodos y quieren sacarlo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Rocío se une al grupo con ganas de venganza. Santiago y Alba sorprenden a todos con una ceremonia poliamorosa. Diego no puede controlar su bebida y su forma de festejar le pasa factura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La fiesta sigue, pero Diego toma una decisión sorprendente. Jaylín se une al grupo y, mientras su bienvenida se descontrola, Karime organiza la primera iniciación en la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: La iniciación de Alba concluye con éxito, pero Jacky aprovecha a Altafulla para incomodarla. Una nueva invitada llega a la casa y Carlos queda cautivado por su encanto, mientras que José y Beni se enfrentan por la atención de Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Los conflictos entre Alba y Altafulla se intensifican. Chile y Beni compiten por llevar a una invitada al despacho. Jacky, tras pasarse de copas, toma una decisión que transformará su relación con Altafulla.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Jacky confronta a todos en la casa para exigir la expulsión de Altafulla. Karime organiza una cita muy mexicana con la intención de espantar a José. Un invitado sorprende a todos, especialmente a Chile y Karime.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Mane and Fernanda get into a physical fight. The conclave decides to give Fernanda an exam to prevent her expulsion. A soccer match between the Shores and the Big Hippos will determine the future of the house.

programme.desc: The exam concludes, and Fernanda stays in the house. Chile overhears the rejected girls’ plan and exposes them. A dance instructor puts Mane and Karime in their place. A brawl erupts at a restaurant.

programme.desc: Kim tests Terry & Gocha's management skills by having them organize a staff photoshoot, which explodes into chaos. Leah meets with Jonathan. Gocha shares a secret with Dontay. Kim styles actress Elise Neal.

programme.desc: Kendra's tested at rehearsals for her sexy Las Vegas play when they flip the script on her. Colin confronts Patti about her tell-all book. Kendra worries about opening night.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra prepares for the worst as opening night draws near; Patti and Colin worry about an unwanted reunion with Eric and his new wife; Kendra fears her dream to reunite her family could be a big mistake.

programme.title: Kendra On Top

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Team Tutera gets an offer they can't refuse when Big Ang (Mob Wives) asks them to plan her son's wedding. It's simple: make this a spectacular affair to remember, or David may end up floating in the East River!

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: Benzino and Althea (Love & Hip Hop) ask David to throw them a last-minute baby shower for their friends and fans. With his own family in town, will David manage to keep both his mom and mom-to-be Althea happy?

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim names the new manager for her salon. Terry forms an unlikely alliance. In Atlanta for the Bronner Brothers Hair Show, chaos erupts when Gocha reveals her "Plan B" and Terry makes a shocking announcement.

programme.title: L.A. Hair

programme.title: Braxton Family Values
programme.desc: The Braxton sisters fear that Trina's weight gain and alcohol abuse are symptoms of depression. They consult a family therapist, then surprise Trina with an intervention.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Mary Mary
programme.desc: Erica is forced to go to an event alone because Tina won't go. When Tina refuses to do Erica a favor, lines are drawn. Warryn pushes Erica to quit Mary Mary.

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le pregunta a Fernanda qué documentos firmó y ella responde que el acuerdo con los españoles. Se los entrega a Ignacio. Leonardo desconfía del Chamoy. Basilio está despechado porque Ivonne e Ignacio son pareja.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Una misma mujer despierta sentimientos encontrados entre padre e hijo y, sin pensarlo, su mirada los convierte en rivales entre el pasado y el presente. Inés quiere que Aurora y Federico se pongan de acuerdo, pero este trata de sobrepasarse con Aurora.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Vanesa le dice a Aurora que Lorenzo nunca se enamoró de su madre y que todo era un plan para quedarse con su fortuna. Ahora Aurora quiere revivir en Lorenzo el amor que sintió en el pasado. Lo que ella no sabe es que un accidente está por suceder.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora pone en marcha su venganza contra Lorenzo y su familia, todo por un juego de lealtades y traiciones entre Vanesa y Natalia. Aurora le dice a Martín que no puede amarlo porque está enamorada de otro hombre, aunque se trata de un amor imposible.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora confiesa que Martín no es parte de su venganza, a pesar de los planes de Vanesa. Lorenzo y Aurora se citan y ella le hace leer un diario que supuestamente escribió su mamá. Martín pasa la noche con una desconocida, que resulta no serlo tanto.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: El padre de Camila pierde su hacienda y su esposa Elvira se va con sus hijos Camila y Armando a la casa de su madre. Esteban consigue ganar suficiente dinero para regresar con su familia.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Bernardo descubre que tiene tres meses de vida y es por eso que decide vender “El Talismán” a la familia Nájera, vivir en Texas y no en California. Gerardo nunca se enteraría de la compra-venta.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Raúl relata que Mariana no tiene cura, que perderá su memoria de manera irreversible hasta que la pierda por completo. Pedro decide no divorciarse de su esposa y poner punto final a su relación con Camila.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Hoy es el cumpleaños de Gregorio, quien decidió festejarlo instalando un casino en su casa e invitando a todos sus amigos, incluyendo a su vecino, Esteban. Camila teme que su papá juegue de nuevo.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: British acting titans Clive Russell and Tim Healy go head-to-head in an antiques battle. They shop around Berwickshire and West Lothian before a thrilling auction in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Poets Benjamin Zephaniah and Roger McGough OBE FRSL hunt for antique treasure around Northamptonshire, Derbyshire and Nottinghamshire, before heading to auction in Leicester.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comedienne Jennifer Saunders hears about the man credited with inventing slapstick comedy, while actress Patricia Potter learns how a surgeon used his sense of smell to successfully treat soldiers injured in WWI.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actors Charles Dance and Geraldine James travel around Wiltshire. Charles finds a pair of Edwardian silver vases, while Geraldine uncovers a 19th century French Empire secretaire. It costs her a small fortune -- will the gamble pay off?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Ruth Madoc and Su Pollard set off from the Welsh border town of Monmouth, heading for Congleton, Cheshire. Ruth gets to find out about an incredible 19th-century nurse, while Su visits ancient Roman town Caerleon.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Italian cooks Antonio Carluccio and Gennaro Contraldo are on a trip around East Anglia. Antonio learns about the brave fisherman of Suffolk who saved mariners' lives while risking their own. And Gennaro gets a peek at a very special bird.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Comic and entertainer Jim Moir and his wife Nancy Sorrell are Road Tripping in Kent today. Look out for Jim's uncanny gift of guessing the age of just about anything, Dixon crossing the Niagara Falls and how to navigate by longitude.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Strictly Come Dancing's Zoe Ball and Iain Waite are quickstepping their way across the southwest of England. Zoe hears how one village became world-famous for lace production, while Iain ends up meeting a giant horse with its own boat.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Prog rocker Rick Wakeman and Ian Lavender enjoy a jolly ride around Norfolk. Rick uncovers some hidden medieval graffiti in Norwich Cathedral, while Ian detours to north Norfolk to see the world's largest collection of model soldiers.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Actor Nigel Havers and his ex-agent Michael Whitehall explore the West Country. What will do best at the auction -- Nigel's old cockle bucket or Michael's tambourine?

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: TV chefs Aldo Zilli and Ching He-Huang do battle around south-eastern England. Aldo plumps for a gold ring despite expert advice, while Ching hopes antiques with an eastern origin will far well at auction in north London.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce opens a seasonal selection box from the Roadshow team.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head to Hartland Abbey in Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items examined include a quilt believed to have been made from royal ball gowns.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items in Scotland include a bowl believed to have belonged to Bonnie Prince Charlie.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include a 10th-century chest, the most valuable piece of furniture seen in a decade.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit the Weald and Downland Museum in Sussex.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a visit to the grounds of the Yorkshire Museum.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A second visit to York, where the team discovers more family gems.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Roadshow first as the team descends on Wimbledon's All England Lawn Tennis Club.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team make a return to Wimbledon's All England Lawn Tennis Club.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team make a return visit to Manchester Town Hall.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team of experts return to Seaton Delaval Hall in Northumberland.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan uses his skills as a wildlife cameraman to gain the trust of a white wolf family; as spring turns to summer, he becomes accepted by the pack, including mother Luna and her three newborn pups.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan reunites with his white wolf family as they try to raise their pups and prepare for winter; he walks with wolves as they hunt lemmings, muskox and hares and encounter a rival pack.

programme.title: Snow Wolf Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan's travels to the remote Canadian Arctic in search of wolves that have never seen people - wolves that have no fear of humans; using his skills as a wildlife cameraman Gordon begins to gain the trust of a white wolf family.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Wildlife and the environment.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Gordon Buchanan must overcome his own fear, black bears have a dangerous reputation and attack more people than any other bear in the world, but once he meets Lily, a tolerant bear, mother of Hope, Gordon feels heartbroken.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: Summer arrives and Gordon finds out that Tiny the bear cub has been abandoned by her mother.

programme.title: The Bear Family and Me
programme.desc: It is autumn and Gordon finds out that Hope is back with her mother.

programme.title: How Nature Works
programme.desc: A lynx depends on a caterpillar to survive, and the forest depends on salmon.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible color change on earth, when the vivid greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: Svalbard in the Arctic spends many months of the year in complete darkness, an unrelenting frozen winter with temperatures down to 40 below Celsius.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: The Okavango Delta is a lush wetland of islands and lagoons in the middle of the vast, featureless Kalahari Desert.

programme.title: Big Bear Diary
programme.desc: Follow the trials and tribulations of North America's bears as they struggle to survive in an increasingly hostile world.

programme.title: Big Bear Diary
programme.desc: The conflict between black bear mothers Jeannie and Katie continue as Jeannie besieges Katie's two cubs in a tree; Brown bear mother Blondie and her three cubs make the most of carrion washed up by the sea.

programme.title: Big Bear Diary
programme.desc: Brown bear mum Blondie and her cubs were last seen fleeing from a pack of wolves. Have they survived? Both the black and polar bear families have trouble with marauding males.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel cooks haddock chowder, crumbed lamb steak with buttered Swede mash and fennel feta linguine.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel introduces new flavor combinations that will reinvigorate our weekly shopping; ricotta beef burger, sesame seed salmon with miring and lemon and thyme cake.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel cooks seven delicious dishes, including chicken and leek pie, mushroom medley and raspberry and cinnamon meringue.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel demonstrates that sometimes simple cookery is the best; herby artichoke stew, chicken in cider and compost crumble.

programme.title: Nigel Slater's Dish of the Day
programme.desc: Nigel offers butternut squash soup with crisps, rib ragout and cherry chocolate iced rice.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: In Moray at the Forres branch of Moray Coast Vets, veterinary surgeons Mark and Johanna, veterinary nurse Anna, and student veterinary nurse Kristin create cakes.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: At John Gillespie hairdressing salon in Perth, owner John, salon director Glen, creative director Fiona and colorist Rachel swap their scissors for scales and mixing bowls as they go head-to-head for the "Flour Power" trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Private client solicitor Dara, senior solicitor Rachael and family solicitor Emma are joined by rookie cake-maker and document manager Jonny where they compete and bake against each other at Aberdeen law firm Ledingham Chalmers.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: The team visits the Bruichladdich distillery on the Hebridean island of Islay where four colleagues compete for the trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: The team goes to the Tron Theatre in Glasgow where four employees battle for the Flour Power trophy.

programme.title: Flour Power
programme.desc: Four coworkers at Cyrenians charity for the homeless compete in a bake off.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc creates four mouth-watering chocolate recipes: a simple mousse, rich chocolate delice, fondant with a melting middle, and his signature dessert: cafe creme, which is a chocolate-sculpted cup filled with a mousse and coffee sabayon.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Raymond dives into the world of fish with the underused and affordable mackerel; he creates a light meal of grilled mackerel with a soy lime dressing.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Raymond Blanc looks to the UK's favorite fruit, apples, for inspiration; he returns to memories of childhood with a simple tart made with a foolproof pastry and custard filling.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc celebrates the season with a winter vegetable salad featuring beetroots, a celeriac puree served with a crisp-skinned roast wild duck with blackberry sauce and watercress soup.

programme.title: Raymond Blanc's Kitchen Secrets
programme.desc: Chef Blanc uses two seasonal ingredients, game and mushrooms, to create a French version of a pasty called pithivier, which is filled with a rich mix of pheasant, chestnuts and dried fruits; he also makes a cep mushroom tortellini with fresh pasta.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After a series of devastating losses, Jon must help an owner and her staff get back on track from their personal tragedies as well as a global pandemic.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Texas to help a husband and wife rescue their failing bar and learn how to be better partners in business.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: To save Weber's Place, Jon must stamp out a culture of theft among the staff and get the bar's owner to start giving a damn.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The customers call the shots at a rowdy Staten Island bar where they pour their own drinks and cook their own food, so Jon tries to help the owners retake control.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon travels to Oakland, California, to help Marshawn Lynch turn around his bar, Rob Ben's, by teaching the NFL star to treat his staff less like family and more like a team.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An explosive conflict breaks out among the owners of Dale 1891 when Jon discovers one of them has been siphoning off profits.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must deflate the ego of a Puerto Rican bar owner who berates his staff and sons as his bar sinks further into debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A failing beachfront bar is shut down after rodents invade the kitchen, and Jon is brought to tears by what the owners have endured.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A decade after a husband and wife left for corporate jobs, they repurchase the Speakeasy Bar & Grill and discover it isn't what it used to be.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A bar and a marriage are on the line as Jon helps owners Tim and Sara save The Brixton, which is rapidly driving the couple into debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: In his first-ever emergency rescue, Jon uses his last resort to help the overwhelmed and grieving owner of Buffalo City Bar & Grille save her father's legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon knew family-run Ohio bar The Black Sheep was in trouble before he arrived, but even he's surprised by the true nature of the bar's debt.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After suffering a personal tragedy, the former punk rocker and owner of the Triple Nickel Tavern nears rock bottom, but Jon's patience only goes so far.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon brings his team to The Palace, a Moroccan-themed bar and restaurant in Upland, CA, where one owner puts the business at risk by drinking the inventory and refusing to try new ideas.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch tries to reunite an Army parachutist with her estranged Naval-officer father, while Cody helps a beautiful woman try to reach record-setting depths at a national free-diving competition.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After he tries to save Tanner from his abusive father, Mitch ends up on the wrong side of the law. Meanwhile, Jessie's irresistible charm makes a stunt pilot's heart take flight.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When caught up in a high-risk adventure at sea, Craig tells Mitch a shocking secret. Meanwhile, Jessie works to creatively end JD and Cody's rivalry during a beachside triathlon, and April comes clean with Manny.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch feels the need for speed when Tanner's cousin, Damon Lusk, a race car driver in town for a major competition, visits Baywatch. Meanwhile, Newmie and the gang develop a TV show about lifeguards that they try to sell it into syndication.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch's lifeguard buddy's ex-wife dies in Australia, Mitch and the team accompany him on a trip down under to meet the son he's never known.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While team Baywatch prepares to compete against the Australian guards, Jake must choose between staying down under with his son or returning home. The competing lifeguards must put their intense rivalry aside to save a life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody learns a lesson in love when he and Mitch help a troubled violinist escape her dangerously overbearing mentor with a secret agenda. Meanwhile, Alex sets out to prove her worth at Baywatch by retaking the grueling rookie test with Jessie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Alex tries to save a diamond smuggler whose partners want him to "sleep with the fishes." Neely makes Hobie a tempting offer that divides the Buchannon household.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Manny suffers a life-altering injury during a rescue, April tries to save him from himself. Neely meets her match in Alex when she tries to discredit Mitch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April and Jessie search for the perfect celebrity host for a seaside beauty contest. Mitch and Alex help Manny adjust to his paralysis.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Alex's search for the creator of several elaborate sandcastles is interrupted when she gets stuck entertaining her best friend's fiancée, who falls madly for Mitch. Cody loses his cool when his new boat is stolen while he's scuba diving with Newmie.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Mitch envisions an International "Top Gun" style lifeguard school in Hawaii. He invites Sean Monroe to lead the new team, which will include a variety of highly-rated lifeguards from beaches around the world.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Amidst the chaos, the new Baywatch Hawaii team must learn to work and live together. Jason meets a man with a mysterious past. A girl Mitch saved suffers from secondary drowning, leading to a critical test of the new recruits.

programme.title: Baywatch Hawaii
programme.desc: Tanner visits Mitch, tours the Islands, and befriends a dying girl. After failing her initial "test", Dawn challenges Sean to a dangerous contest with her future at Baywatch hanging in the balance. JD competes to join the America's Cup Sailing Team.

programme.title: Bellator NYC: Sonnen vs Silva
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Madison Square Garden in NY with a blockbuster card. Chael Sonnen and Wanderlei Silva in a long-awaited grudge match. The double main event also sees Fedor Emelianenko taking on Matt Mitrione. Also, Douglas Lima and Michael Chandler!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is live with its biggest show ever from Madison Square Garden featuring new signee Ryan Bader taking on Champ Phil Davis for the Light Heavyweight belt. Irish phenom James Gallagher taking on KO artist Chinzo Machida.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA takes place in Thackerville, Oklahoma with a rubber match between two veteran standouts as Brandon Girtz meets Derek Campos in a main event sure to produce fireworks! The stacked card also features fights with Joe Warren and Kendall Grove.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is from Verona, New York with a Middleweight showdown as Chidi Njokuani takes on former champ Andrey Koreshkov. Heavy-handed Brennan Ward will face off against Fernando Gonzalez in the co-main slot.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes home to San Jose, California with a collision between top lightweights as Patricky Pitbull meets Benson Henderson. Plus the Bellator debut of Roy “Big Country” Nelson when he faces hard-hitting Javy Ayala in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville as Eduardo Dantas puts his Bantamweight world title on the line against Darrion Caldwell. This stacked fight card also features Daniel Straus taking on Emmanuel Sanchez and Pat Curran facing off against John Macapa.

programme.title: Bellator 185: Mousasi vs. Shlemenko
programme.desc: The elite two-division threat, Gegard Mousasi makes his Bellator debut against former Middleweight Champion Alexander Shlemenko who is on a five-fight win streak.

programme.title: Bellator 186: Bader vs Vassell
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Penn State as accomplished alumni Phil Davis and Ed Ruth return to their roots. Light Heavyweight Champ Ryan Bader defends his belt. Plus Ilima-Lei Macfarlane and Emily Ducote clash for the inaugural flyweight world title!

programme.title: Bellator 187: McKee vs Moore
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Dublin as Irish fan-favorite Brian Moore meets undefeated rising sensation, AJ McKee. Baby Slice returns to the cage, and Conor McGregor’s training partner Charlie Ward battles John Redmond in a fight sure to provide fireworks!

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator is back with featherweight action as world champion Julia Budd puts her title on the line in a grudge rematch against Australian Arlene Blencowe.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A 17-year-old football star accused of rape -- and the alleged victim, a 16-year-old classmate -- speak out about how one alcohol-fueled night changed their lives in an instant. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Affairs, fights, lies & dark secrets have divided family & friends. Brandon, a handsome, charming firefighter, has an ugly secret. One year into his marriage to Amy, he was caught cheating with their teenage nanny. Yet Brandon filed for divorce? Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kim & ex-husband, Ryan, are terrified of son, Rylan, 7, who has a fascination with knives, talks to an imaginary friend named "Bleeder", and has sent two teachers to the hospital. What might be causing Rylan's aggressive behavior?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brad says he is in a bitter custody battle with ex Kimberly, who's kept him from seeing their three kids. Kimberly says Brad is unstable & irresponsible and until he cleans up his act, he can't see their kids. Can these exes learn to peacefully co-parent?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Calah Waskow, 15, made national news when allegedly abducted by her friend's 37-year-old dad. Issuing an Amber Alert, Calah was found five days later. What happened to her? Did she have a secret relationship with the older man? Calah tells her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Over 10 years ago, Suzy says she developed a "mysterious illness" that leaves her shaking, trembling, convulsing and having to force-feed herself more than 7,000 calories a day to stop her "attacks"! What could this mysterious illness possibly be?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Crystal accuses her ex-boyfriend, Anthony, of sexually assaulting their 3-year-old daughter. Crystal says she has proof confirming Anthony as the monster she says he is. Anthony says Crystal is “crazy and a liar.” Can Dr. Phil expose the truth? Part 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie, 22, says her boyfriend Justin, 25, has an anger problem, and she fears for her life and for their 10-month-old son. Both admit their child has witnessed turmoil. Does this young relationship have a future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Ex-spouses Pam & Jim say they've spent $1 million combined in a custody battle for Dawn, 9, a fight that includes multiple arrests, restraining orders & accusations of abuse & molestation. Can the parents stop finger-pointing & mud-slinging?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his interview with Heather & Brian, feuding parents over 15-yr-old son Brandon's death. Hear from Brandon's friends, the last to see him alive and two of the young men make shocking allegations against Heather. How does she respond?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Kaye, Hear from Kathy's daughter who sides with Kaye. Plus, who is "Aaron?" Dr. Phil digs deep in search of answers -- tune in to see the results of the investigation! Is Kaye being scammed? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Horrific allegations are tearing a family apart. Todd, ex girlfriend Latia & mom Diana tell their versions of sexual misconduct. Todd says he will do anything to prove his innocence. Dr. Phil calls in a polygraph examiner, with shocking results.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Christina, Jim & daughter Tara. She says she's worried her daughter is in a toxic situation with dad Jim & his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Meet the new wife & find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Emily in Paris" stars Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo are joining Drew for a round of Drew & A. Pilar Valdes is joining Drew in the kitchen to whip up some yummy crepes.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Legendary actress Whoopi Goldbergis here! Actor and co-host of the podcast "Las Culturistas," Matt Rogers is serving up the news sunny-side up with Drew andRossMathews.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Hillary Rodham Clinton and her daughter Chelsea Clinton, who share what it was like going on adventures for new docuseries, "Gutsy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew sits down with tennis superstar Serena Williams to chat about her final match, her family life and her new children's book, 'The Adventures of Qai Qai.' Plus, Serena plays a rapid fire round of all of her favorites in GOATS To Go.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, upcycling expert Sarah Teresinski is transforming items off the street that she found on the Stooping NYC Instagram page.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Preppy Kitchen: Recipes for Seasonal Dishes and Simple Pleasures" cookbook author John Kanell joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for Drew's News: Food Edition.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering everything from the new freemium trend in dating apps to the grinch getting a horror makeover this Christmas to the great 1860 painting cellphone debate.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Bill Nye The Science Guy are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Chef Pilar Valdes reveals five essential pantry items and turns them into a delicious dish.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: History of the World Part Two" StarIke Barinholtz is joins Drew and talks about how he met his wife in Las Vegas, his new show and more. Peloton Instructor Ally Love joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Today" co-anchor Savannah Guthrie is serving the news sunny-side up with Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk and dishing on her new series "Princess Power." Aubrey Plaza stops by to chat about the follow-up to "The Return of the Christmas Witch.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: In an all-new Drew Gooder Drew has a big surprise in store for Deloris "NuNu" and Patrick "PopPop" Hogan who run a safe and reliable 24-hour daycare to help the parents in their community.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, author of the best-selling memoir, "I'm Glad My Mom Died," has a very honest and revealing conversation with Drew.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up covering the one thing Drake regrets about his rap career and how long experts say it takes to decide if you're attracted to someone.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kiera Knightley and Carrie Coon join Drew to talk about their upcoming film, "Boston Strangler."Drew and her co-pilotRoss Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Kerry Washington stars in an all-new comedy show, 'UnPrisoned' by creator Tracy McMillan, and they're joining Drew to dish all about the new series.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Celebrity interior designer Mikel Welch joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to tackle the latest design headlines including gnome mania, interior designers doubling as marriage counselors, the Biophilic design trend and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Woman King" star John Boyega stops by to chat and roller skate with Drew. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Bill Nye shares his 60 second experiment.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to hit the headlines! James Beard Award-winning author Tamar Adler joins Drew andTonyDokoupil in the kitchen to serve up something delicious.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Your Place or Mine" star Tig Notaro is telling Drew about working with Reese Witherspoon on their new film and the latest season of "The Morning Show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Entertainment Tonight's Kevin Frazier and Nischelle Turner are joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk for a special Oscars themed Drew's News, sharing their predictions for the awards show.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Jessica Biel tells Drew about dog sledding and plays "The Real Biel" trivia. Derek Blasberg joins Drew and Ross to cover news, including Dolly Parton's award and throwback fashion.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering headlines like the woman who tweeted the unusual snack her fellow plane passenger whipped out and the new device that allows lovers to kiss virtually.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew interviews President Joe Biden and First Lady Jill Biden, discussing their relationship and Christmas traditions. FLOTUS gives a tour of the White House Christmas Decorations.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathewsare covering the news including headlines like the study that found mammals who have friends live longer and the ice cream shop in D.C. serving everyone, even those who can't pay! Pilar Valdesis back with a new Pro Tips with Pilar.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny tries to find the perfect man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Dr. Martin of the zoo keeps giving Ellie more critters than Granny can stand. While Jim Gardner (or Jim Garrrrr!) comes to sell "bug vittles" but ends up falling for Ellie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed and Mr. Drysdale try matching Ellie with the bank's new CPA Fred Penrod (or Rod Fredpen) while Lafe continues to try to find where "Jed has his money buried".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Lafe Crick tries some match making with his son Dub and Ellie. Jed has his reservations.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tries to get the Clampetts interested in deep-sea fishing by sending them to Marineland. Thinking that it's a fishing hole, Granny wants to "catch the whale".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: It's tonic time in Beverly Hills. Granny's made a batch of tonic and sends a sample to their new neighbor, the Countess Maria. She loves it and throws a party to celebrate.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is having a ground-breaking ceremony for a new bank building and the Clampetts think they need to pitch in to help build it. Meanwhile, Mr. Drysdale's associates try to get stock market tips off of Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale has Jed buy a Beverly Hills dress store for an investment and the Clampetts show up to help "the poor widow and her starving girls".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies (CBS TV)
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.desc: Patti and her staff minister to three new millionaires; Patti admits to her mother that her own love life has been strained due to her long working hours.

programme.title: The Millionaire Matchmaker

programme.desc: The team reinvestigates case when new information links the unexplained death to a series of drug rapes in East London.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The UCOS team reinvestigate a hit and run that left a cycle courier with a serious brain injury and complete memory loss of anything prior to the accident.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: When a people smuggler is found dead in the city, Nikki delves into London's illegal immigrant community. She meets a vulnerable Syrian teen called Akka who is in need of help, putting Nikki in a moral dilemma, and the killer is still on the loose.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: When Nikki, Jack and Thomas make a horrific discovery in the van, they're confronted with the work of a killer who preys on illegal immigrants. With the help of Clarissa, they must work out where the killer will strike next.

programme.title: Waking the Dead

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: When a convicted killer is cleared of the murder of his adoptive father 10 years before, Boyd is not so sure of his innocence and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Waking the Dead

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: A therapist alerts the CCS to a care home regime of sexual abuse of young boys and a suspected murder, but the patient who revealed this goes missing.

programme.desc: The discovery of a mummified body is just the beginning of a gruesome case where many more bodies are waiting to be found.

programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en Español): Traición
programme.desc: Danny se une a la búsqueda de dos fugitivos, siendo uno de ellos alguien a quien ayudó a encarcelar injustamente. Gormley critica un plan de Trey Delgado, un sargento de la policía de Nueva York que, según el, está teniendo una aventura con su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en Español): Juicio apresurado
programme.desc: Cuando Jamie es captado por la cámara cometiendo lo que podría interpretarse como brutalidad policial en una manifestación contra las políticas, Frank se ve obligado a entregar el caso a Asuntos Internos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en Español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fin del juego
programme.desc: Con la ayuda del equipo, Vance se enfrenta a sus demonios mientras descubre una compleja relación con un asesino que pone en peligro a toda su familia.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Apagón
programme.desc: El equipo se encuentra literalmente a oscuras cuando la investigación sobre la muerte de un teniente se relaciona con un apagón en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Juego de niños
programme.desc: El trabajo diurno de un marine muerto en un laboratorio de ideas del gobierno lleva a Gibbs y al equipo a la vida de un niño prodigio de 12 años que puede ser el próximo objetivo del asesino.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Fe
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo alistado de un coronel retirado convertido en predicador aparece muerto, el equipo cree que puede ser víctima de un crimen de odio. Mientras tanto, el padre de Gibbs viene de visita por vacaciones.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un seguidor de un conocido orador motivacional es asesinado, el equipo sospecha del propio orador.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Leading up to the Run for a Million show, Andrea undercuts Matt's search for the perfect horse, Abby deals with a flooded practice arena, and Craig seeks a much-needed payday.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: At the National Reining Breeders Classic, Jason has a chance to prove his skills equal Andrea's, and Cade has to come through in the clutch.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Abby faces a tough decision, Casey deals with mounting home-construction costs, and the pressure rises as the riders choose the horses they'll take to Run for a Million.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: In the first annual Run for a Million in Las Vegas, the riders compete for the first-ever million-dollar purse in horse-reining history.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The top trainers in the sport of horse reining dial up the heat in Arizona as they try to qualify for this year's Run For A Million -- giving them a shot at the largest purse in the history of the sport.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the final qualifiers selected for this year's Run For A Million, it's back to the ranches as the McCutcheon dynasty gets back to business. After missing the qualifier, Abby Lengel must begin the process of trying to get back into the competition.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Andrea, Matt, and Craig share the struggles and joys of the sport they love while training some of the next generation's brightest reining stars -- their children.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The competitors test their best Run For A Million prospects at the NRBC in Katy, TX. Some riders are sliding away with big checks while others are realizing they might not have the caliber of horse they will need to take the top prize in Vegas.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: With the Run for a Million just around the corner, the top riders meet at the NHRA Derby for one final test before Vegas. The underdogs are out to prove they are a force to be reckoned with against the top contenders.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: The moment has finally arrived as the sport's best riders gather in Vegas with their eyes on the top prize. The excitement and tension are high as these riders know that one perfect ride could change their lives forever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies. Police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat. A mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home. Prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain. Deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man blames the weed found in his car on his absent nephew, a suspect in custody starts to convulse, and police respond to a call about an armed man tripping on bath salts.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels. Deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies find a child in the backseat of a hit-and-run suspect's car, officers respond to a shoplifting call, and a man calls the cops over his stepson's erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers intervene when a dispute between neighbors gets heated, suspects of a shooting lead police on a high-speed pursuit, and a domestic argument gets out of hand.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man hands police his gun unannounced, an oblivious suspect tries to make money ripping off two detectives, and a driver's inability to do simple math lands her in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are forced to use a taser to subdue a drunk driver. A man who claims he’s merely returning a bicycle to its owner is arrested for soliciting prostitution. Officers respond to a complex domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate a possible abduction at a trailer park. A man in a stolen truck is pulled over and Officers discover washed checks and drug paraphernalia. A suspect is arrested after abandoning a stolen vehicle behind a fast food restaurant.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chatty motorist becomes agitated when officers start asking questions, a fleeing driver calls his wife in the middle of a pursuit, and deputies catch a man in a lie.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop escalates to a dangerous situation, a woman admits to hitting her dad in the face with her teeth, and a defiant driver doesn't want deputies to search his car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police are led on a lengthy chase, a man is pulled over in a new car he doesn't own, and a detained woman has choice words about her boyfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: CSI

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Rascal Flatts takes center stage when a band member is electrocuted by his own guitar during a concert, the CSI team investigates if it was a case of foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a young boy is found murdered, the CSI team uncovers evidence that may link his death to an old case that recently resurfaced.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: When the CSI team investigates the brutal murder of a family, they trace the killer to the house next door, which might belong to the "Dr. Jekyll" serial killer.

programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy take a group of high school CSI Explorer Scouts on a field trip, they embellish their role in solving cases and take their assignment a little bit too far.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A legendary comic from the good old days of Las Vegas is set to reunite with his partner on stage for one night only, until one half of the famous duo is found dead.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: The CSI team must investigate one of their own when Langston is accused by a former colleague of being part of the Dr. Jekyll murders, on part one of a two-part season finale.

programme.title: CSI

programme.desc: Speedle y Delko están disfrutando de un lugar nocturno de moda en Miami, Club Descent, cuando la pirotecnia del DJ desencadena un incendio que arrasa al club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en la cultura de las drogas después de que ocurre un brutal asesinato y una explosión casi fatal en la casa de un adicto a la metanfetamina.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando llaman a Horatio al Centro de Detención de West Miami para investigar a un preso asesinado, termina presenciando la fuga de tres presos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que una joven modelo es asesinada por un conductor que se da a la fuga, Horatio investiga al dueño del auto, que afirma que se lo prestó a los invitados a su fiesta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un hombre arponeado a su yate lleva a Horatio al mundo de la búsqueda de tesoros en la actualidad y a la enorme codicia que viene aparejada.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se llevan a la fenómeno del tenis Lana Walker de su habitación por la noche y la única evidencia que tienen para continuar es una fibra púrpura encontrada en el marco de la ventana.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando golpean casi hasta la muerte a una ex-víctima de violación, Horacio debe entrar al mundo de las cárceles y las personas en libertad condicional para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a masked man is found at the bottom of a notorious skyscraper known for its history of mysterious deaths.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young pizza maker is carjacked, the CSI New York team of investigators must determine what the perpetrators were really after.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and the team partner with D.B. Russell to outsmart Christine’s kidnappers before they run out of time to save her life.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, Detective Mac Taylor and the rest of the CSI New York team tackle three twisted tales of love gone wrong.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Community unrest over the police shooting of an unarmed man forces Mac and the CSI New York team to move quickly to solve the case.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor discovers the body of a woman in Brooklyn Heights, when his investigation leads him to a serial killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and Danny Messer go underground, entering the world of the ‘Sandhogs,’ men who burrow beneath New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detectives Stella Bonasera and Danny Messer’s mission to find a brutal rapist is hindered, as the victim has no memory of the assault.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A practical joke spirals into a century spanning murder mystery when a skeleton placed on a tour bus turns out to be authentic.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: CSIs Investigate when New York’s hottest DJ is found dead minutes before being crowned the undisputed “scratching” champion.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The brutal stabbing of a young woman leads Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera to Stuyvesant Town, the middle-class epicenter of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a test of faith, Mac Taylor assigns Detectives Danny Messer and Aiden Burn to one of the CSI team’s toughest cases yet.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El intocable (S7 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a una mujer obsesionada con conspiraciones, el equipo de CSI investiga y descubre que algunas de sus teorías pueden haber tenido algo de verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hacer o morir (S7 Ep17)
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un alumno popular en la escuela privada más elitista de Manhattan, el equipo de CSI se encuentra en el competitivo mundo de los más privilegiados.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Crisis de identidad (S7 Ep18)
programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Comida con sentimiento (S7 Ep19)
programme.desc: El equipo entra en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida gourmet cuando uno explota en un festival de comida de SoHo mientras Hawkes está ahí con su novia.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Nada a cambio (S7 Ep20)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una mujer como obra de un asesino en serie. Mac vuelve a ponerse en contacto con su primer compañero después de que un ex convicto empieza a acosarlo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cadena perpetua (S7 Ep21)
programme.desc: Después de que una lluvia de disparos cruza el laboratorio de criminalística, Mac y su excompañero se convierten en parte de una venganza que lleva 17 años.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Estrategia de salida (S7 Ep22)
programme.desc: Después de una experiencia cercana a la muerte, el detective Mac Taylor está bastante decidido a cerrar su último caso sin resolver.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Imborrable (S8 Ep1)
programme.desc: En el décimo aniversario del 11 de setiembre, Mac y el equipo recuerdan momentos específicos de ese día que les quedaron grabados de forma indeleble en la mente.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hazlo realidad (S8 Ep2)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerto a un adolescente torpe, el equipo descubre que sus esfuerzos por conquistar el corazón de una atractiva roquera punk pueden haber ido demasiado lejos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El caballero andante (S8 Ep3)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran el cuerpo de una hermosa joven en una Ferrari robada, la investigación conduce a una familia de ladrones de autos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oficial involucrado (S8 Ep4)
programme.desc: Una salida nocturna amistosa para tomar un trago sufre un cambio inesperado cuando Danny y sus policías novatos se ven envueltos en un tiroteo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Las apariencias engañan (S8 Ep5)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York investiga cuando el hermano de un joven prodigio del básquet, recientemente liberado bajo palabra, está involucrado en un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¡Déjenme salir! (S8 Ep6)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando una broma de fraternidad en el Día de Brujas sale mal y un maestro de ceremonias es dado por muerto en una tumba abierta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juego siniestro (S8 Ep7)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando la noticia de una fiesta en una escuela secundaria se vuelve viral, lo que da lugar a una aglomeración, un porche colapsado y la muerte de una adolescente.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is the one who could use some help after his good deeds backfire on him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Roz play matchmakers for their parents – with disastrous results.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody's girl agrees to marry Frenchman Henri to keep him from getting deported.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca blames Sam for their lack of offspring when she passes her fertility test.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Rebecca question whether or not they really love each other.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier takes his "low self-esteem group" to Cheers for interactive therapy.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody takes a second job at a graveyard to pay for Kelly's engagement ring.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Carla acts like a holy terror when her son decides to join the priesthood.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier has a run-in with his first wife while at a children's concert with his family.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne flee her wedding altar but soon discover the heavy price to pay for admitting their true love as jilted groom Donny and bitter wife Mel seek revenge.

programme.title: Muchachos Impacientes
programme.desc: Estrellas y rivales juntos en una hilarante comedia musical. Grandes voces se unen en un espectáculo benéfico donde ocurrirán muchos disparates.

programme.title: Mujeres Encantadoras
programme.desc: Un grupo de mujeres sospechan que sus parejas son infieles y arman un enredo a los pobres mujeriegos involucrados.

programme.title: El tren del infierno
programme.desc: Mientras un tren atraviesa las Montañas Rocosas, los pasajeros están siendo asesinados. La única esperanza es John Deakin, el cual descubre un secreto que explota en un torrente de revelaciones impactantes, peleas y tiroteos explosivos.

programme.title: Cometieron dos errores
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood protagoniza esta historia sobre una banda de justicieros que cometen dos errores: ahorcar al hombre equivocado y no terminar el trabajo. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern y Dennis Hopper coprotagonizan este western de acción.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir
programme.desc: Después de cumplir su condena, un ex pistolero regresa a su ciudad planeando vivir una vida tranquila. Sin embargo, los hijos de un hombre al que mató tienen otros planes.

programme.title: El Norteño Enamorado
programme.desc: Una ataviada historia que entreteje la opulencia de un hacendado, la codicia y envidia de quien quiere arrebatarle sus propiedades y en medio, las víctimas junto con quienes vienen a exigir justicia.

programme.title: El tren del infierno

programme.title: Dead Man Walking

programme.title: Valkiria
programme.desc: Una dramatización del asesinato y complot político del 20 de julio de 1944 por oficiales del ejército alemán renegados desesperados contra Adolf Hitler durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Acechada
programme.desc: Una mujer policía recibe un caso en el que descubre que todos los asesinados son antiguos novios.

programme.title: El caso Thomas Crown
programme.desc: Thomas Crown (McQueen), un millonario de Boston, un hombre que se ha hecho a sí mismo, se aburre de la vida que lleva. Para huir de la rutina, prepara un golpe perfecto: robar un banco y marcharse después a Brasil.

programme.title: Leones por corderos
programme.desc: Tres historias interrelacionadas: un profesor intenta inspirar a uno de sus alumnos, dos de sus antiguos alumnos se encuentran atrapados en Afganistán, y un senador en Washington tiene una nueva estrategia de guerra.

programme.title: Otoño en Nueva York
programme.desc: El exitoso playboy Will (Richard Gere) nunca ha pensado seriamente en el compromiso hasta que conoce a Charlotte (Winona Ryder). A medida que su relación se convierte en algo maravilloso, ambos se dan cuenta de que este amor podría durar toda la vida...

programme.title: Fachon Models
programme.desc: Ulises es un actor fracasado que trabaja en avisos comerciales. Después de reunirse con Carolina, su novia de la escuela primaria, encuentra la motivación para obtener mejores conciertos y ponerse en forma.

programme.title: Pobres divas
programme.desc: Nora y Mary solo conocen la buena vida en Beverly Hills, pero la fortuna de papá se esfuma. Una tía las toma bajo su protección, pero ella vive del "otro lado de la ciudad". Ríete mientras las princesas se embarcan en la mayor aventura de sus vidas.

programme.title: Complices
programme.desc: Un seductor experto lleva a su sobrino en un viaje a la playa en busca de mujeres calientes. Pero la única mujer capaz de causarle problemas, aparece allí.

programme.title: Labios rojos
programme.desc: Ricardo obtiene una gran promoción, pero la presión por el éxito laboral lo llevará al fracaso en asuntos maritales. Una comedia moderna y conocedora sobre los altibajos del trabajo y el amor.

programme.title: Fachon Models
programme.desc: Ulises es un actor fracasado que trabaja en avisos comerciales. Después de reunirse con Carolina, su novia de la escuela primaria, encuentra la motivación para obtener mejores conciertos y ponerse en forma.

programme.title: El heredero del crimen
programme.desc: Dragon Mao debe liderar la policía local, pero pronto descubre toda la corrupción policial que pasa bajo sus narices. Cuando se lo acusa del robo en una joyería, Dragon Mao debe luchar para limpiar su nombre.

programme.title: Los buscapleitos
programme.desc: Thomas y David llevan una vida simple en España, trabajando en su camión de comidas rápidas pero todo cambia completamente por culpa de una hermosa ladrona, Sylvia.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: Rambo: Primera Sangre
programme.desc: El veterano de la guerra de Vietnam, John J. Rambo, vaga a una pequeña ciudad de Washington en busca de su viejo amigo, pero se encuentra con la intolerancia y brutalidad del aguacil, Will Teasle.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2

programme.title: Estación zombi
programme.desc: Una desgarradora película de terror y suspenso zombi, que sigue a un grupo de pasajeros aterrorizados que se abren camino a través de un brote viral en todo el país.

programme.title: El Perfume: Historia de un asesino
programme.desc: En Francia, en el siglo 18, vivió Jean-Baptiste Grenouille, que nació con un gran sentido del olfato. Pero cuando su don se transforma en obsesión, lucha por crear el perfume más excitante del mundo matando jovencitas para capturar su esencia.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: Aulas peligrosas
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria de un pueblo descubre que el cuerpo docente está bajo el control de parásitos alienígenas. Con el guión inteligente de Kevin Williamson "Scream" y dirigida por Robert Rodriguez "From Dusk Till Dawn

programme.title: Cursed
programme.desc: El guionista y el director de Scream, vuelven a unirse para dar otro paseo por el lado oscuro. Luego de un ataque brutal de parte de una criatura terrorífica, dos hermanos exhiben comportamientos que los hacen creer que los ha mordido un hombre lobo.

programme.desc: Podría decirse que es la historia navideña más extravagante. Billy Bob Thornton es un Santa ladrón al que no le interesa si fuiste bueno o malo. Lo seguirán un guardia de seguridad, una cantinera sexi y un niño que cree que él es real.

programme.title: Bad Santa 2 (MIRAMAX) ES

programme.title: A Toda Madre: A Toda Madre
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: Gambit
programme.desc: Un curador de arte decide vengarse de su abusivo jefe engañándolo para que compre un Monet falso, pero su plan requiere la ayuda de una excéntrica e impredecible reina del rodeo de Texas.

programme.desc: Mike and Gloria are all excited about their first wedding anniversary and order take-out as a special dinner. Sitting around the dinner table, an argument ensues which leads to Edith recalling the day Archie met Mike.

programme.desc: Felix becomes an active member of the Civilian Police Reserves and looms as a threat to criminals everywhere -- and to innocent citizens, as well.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Hugh Hefner is the special guest star for this episode which recalls a time when Felix Unger was engaged to Gloria and photographed her for the centerfold of Playboy Magazine.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix and Oscar's bowling team, the "Bon Vivants," battle the "Kingpins" for the championship in a game which marks the first time in five years the Bon Vivantshave a chance to win.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar gets a chance to appear as himself in a Hollywood movie and Felix nearly botches everything by accompanying him as a self-appointed agent.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
